brand.name: PursuitAI
brand.trial_line: Free 14-day trial · no credit card · from $249/mo

topics.headline: Stop guessing which bids fit.
topics.body: Claude AI scores every opportunity across 5 dimensions — NAICS match, set-aside eligibility, vehicle status, technical alignment, and competitive position — grounded in YOUR incumbency and win/loss history.
topics.hook_x: Most small GovCon firms chase the wrong bids. PursuitAI scores every opportunity across 5 dimensions — specific to YOUR firm, not a generic match %. Know your real fit before you spend a single capture dollar.
topics.hook_ig:
Bid/no-bid shouldn't be a gut call.

PursuitAI scores every SAM.gov opportunity across 5 dimensions — NAICS match, set-aside eligibility, vehicle holder status, technical alignment, and competitive position — grounded in your actual incumbency and win/loss history.

Every score comes with the evidence behind it.

topics.headline: Start capture 12+ months before the RFP drops.
topics.body: Scan USASpending for contracts expiring in 6–36 months in your NAICS space. Spot the incumbent, see the award value, and get in early.
topics.hook_x: The winners of next year's contracts started capture this year. Recompete Radar scans USASpending for contracts expiring in 6–36 months in your NAICS — so you're building relationships before the RFP ever drops.
topics.hook_ig:
By the time an RFP hits SAM.gov, the winner has usually been working it for a year.

Recompete Radar scans USASpending for federal contracts expiring in 6–36 months in your NAICS space — filter by agency, spot the incumbent, and start capture while there's still time to shape the deal.

Zero AI credits. Pure signal.

topics.headline: The only built-in FAR 52.219-14 check.
topics.body: Model your prime/sub split for a compliant / at-risk / over-limit verdict — evaluated across the base period AND each option year, since a plan can pass on total dollars yet fail a single year.
topics.hook_x: A subcontracting plan can pass on total dollars and still fail a single option year. PursuitAI's FAR 52.219-14 calculator checks every period separately — and tells you exactly how much headroom you have left. No competitor has this.
topics.hook_ig:
The Limitations on Subcontracting rule (FAR 52.219-14) kills more set-aside bids than bad pricing.

PursuitAI models your prime/sub split — counting similarly-situated entities correctly — for a compliant / at-risk / over-limit verdict BEFORE you sign. Evaluated across the base period and every option year separately.

A dollar-headroom solver even tells you which partner to adjust to recover the most room.

topics.headline: Find primes who actually sub to small businesses.
topics.body: Ranked by real subcontract dollars in your NAICS, filterable by set-aside — with a one-click AI-drafted teaming email grounded in their sub-award history and your past performance.
topics.hook_x: Cold-emailing primes is a waste. PursuitAI ranks the primes who ACTUALLY subcontract to small businesses in your NAICS — by real dollars — then drafts the teaming email for you. The GovWin capability without the $20K/yr price tag.
topics.hook_ig:
Stop pitching primes who never subcontract.

Sub-Award Intelligence ranks the primes who actually flow dollars to small businesses in your NAICS — sourced from real sub-award data, filterable by set-aside.

Then one click drafts a teaming email grounded in their sub-award history and your past performance.

This is the capability firms used to pay $20K/year for.

topics.headline: Price against what the government actually paid.
topics.body: Per-contract recommendations anchored to USAspending obligations, GSA CALC + eLibrary labor rates, and BLS wage data — with an AI read on whether to bid aggressive, at-market, or premium.
topics.hook_x: Don't price against a market average. Price against what the government actually paid the incumbent. PursuitAI anchors your number to USAspending obligations + GSA CALC rates + BLS wages — then recommends a bid posture with the risks spelled out.
topics.hook_ig:
The incumbent's price is public data — if you know where to look.

Price-to-Win anchors your bid to what the government actually paid: USAspending obligations, GSA CALC labor ceilings, eLibrary schedule rates, and BLS OEWS wages across 30 GovCon occupations.

Tweak your undercut %, model scope reductions, and drop real rates straight into your cost narrative.

topics.headline: Draft the winning proposal in hours, not weeks.
topics.body: Claude drafts section by section against the real solicitation — grounded in your named past performance contracts. Compliance matrices, outlines, capture plans, full drafts. Export to Word.
topics.hook_x: Proposal week shouldn't mean all-nighters. PursuitAI drafts section by section against the actual solicitation — grounded in YOUR past performance, never invented. Technical approach, management plan, past perf, cost narrative. Export to Word.
topics.hook_ig:
What if your first draft took hours instead of weeks?

PursuitAI drafts proposals section by section against the real solicitation — technical approach, management plan, past performance, cost narrative — grounded in your named contracts so nothing gets invented.

Upload the RFP packet (PDF + XLSX + DOCX), get a compliance matrix in one pass, then draft.

topics.headline: Know exactly where you stand in your 9-year term.
topics.body: Developmental vs transitional stage badge, term progress clock, next SBA annual-review date, and stage-aware alerts — the 8(a) lifecycle no competitor tracks.
topics.hook_x: Your 8(a) term is a 9-year clock — and most firms don't plan the back half. PursuitAI tracks your stage, your next SBA review, and alerts you to line up backup set-asides before time runs out. No other platform does this.
topics.hook_ig:
The 8(a) program is a 9-year window. Are you managing it like one?

The 8(a) Lifecycle Copilot shows your developmental vs transitional stage, term progress, eligibility time remaining, and your next SBA annual-review date — with alerts that get louder as graduation approaches.

Under 2 years left? It nudges you to line up backup set-asides. That's planning, not panic.

topics.headline: The directed-award play, automated.
topics.body: Generate the package you send a CO to support a directed 8(a) sole-source award — with a built-in FAR 19.805-1 threshold check so it never claims authority you don't have.
topics.hook_x: 8(a) firms: sole-source awards don't just happen — you make the case. PursuitAI drafts the full CO package (regulatory basis, responsible source, agency benefit) with a FAR 19.805-1 threshold check built in. No competitor automates this.
topics.hook_ig:
The best 8(a) contract is the one that was never competed.

PursuitAI drafts the package you send a contracting officer to support a directed 8(a) sole-source award: the regulatory-basis narrative, responsible-source case, agency-benefit story, and a draft CO letter — grounded in your real past performance.

Built-in FAR 19.805-1 threshold check ($4.5M services / $7.0M manufacturing) keeps every package honest.

topics.headline: 9,000+ vehicle holders. One search.
topics.body: Search across 14 GWACs (STARS III, CIO-SP3, Polaris, Alliant 2, SEWP VI, GSA MAS), predict competitors from FPDS history, and screen every partner live against SAM.gov exclusions.
topics.hook_x: Building a team? PursuitAI searches 9,000+ contract vehicle holders across 14 GWACs, predicts your competitors from FPDS data, and screens every candidate against the SAM.gov exclusions registry — before you sign anything.
topics.hook_ig:
Your teaming partner search shouldn't be LinkedIn + a spreadsheet.

PursuitAI searches 9,000+ vehicle holders across 14 GWACs — STARS III, CIO-SP3, Polaris, Alliant 2, SEWP VI, GSA MAS — and predicts likely competitors from agency + NAICS history.

Every partner is screened live against SAM.gov exclusions, so a debarred firm gets flagged before you team with it.

topics.headline: Let the primes find YOU.
topics.body: Opt into the Subcontractor Directory and primes assembling a team can discover your firm by NAICS, set-aside cert, and state — capabilities and past performance one click away.
topics.hook_x: Every tool helps you find partners. PursuitAI also runs the other direction: opt into the Subcontractor Directory and primes assembling teams discover YOU — by NAICS, set-aside cert, and state. Inbound teaming is the best teaming.
topics.hook_ig:
The best teaming call is the one you receive.

Opt into PursuitAI's Subcontractor Directory and primes assembling a team can find your firm by NAICS, set-aside certification — 8(a), SDVOSB, WOSB, HUBZone — and state, with your capabilities and past performance one click away.

Everyone else's tools only search outward. This is the direction the market forgot.

topics.headline: Your JV can bid more than you think.
topics.body: Record your SBA-approved MPA once and PursuitAI unlocks every set-aside your JV can win — even with a large mentor (13 CFR 125.9) — with workshare compliance built in.
topics.hook_x: Have a Mentor-Protégé JV? It can bid ANY set-aside the protégé qualifies for — even with a large-business mentor. PursuitAI is the only platform that models your JV's inherited eligibility and surfaces those bids automatically.
topics.hook_ig:
Most Mentor-Protégé JVs under-bid their own eligibility.

Under 13 CFR 125.9, your JV can pursue any set-aside the protégé qualifies for — even with a large mentor. PursuitAI records your JV once, then badges every JV-eligible opportunity, credits the mentor's agency experience in scoring, and verifies protégé workshare (≥40%) for compliance.

No competitor models inherited JV eligibility.

topics.headline: One search across SAM.gov + 21 agency forecasts.
topics.body: Auto-import from SAM.gov, DHS APFS, HHS, DOE, DOT, NASA, EPA, HUD, State, USACE and more — plus GSA eBuy RFQs. Weekly automated ingest keeps everything fresh.
topics.hook_x: SAM.gov is where opportunities END up. Agency forecasts are where they START. PursuitAI merges SAM.gov + 21 agency forecast systems + GSA eBuy into one scored feed — refreshed automatically every week.
topics.hook_ig:
If you only watch SAM.gov, you're seeing opportunities last.

PursuitAI pulls agency procurement forecasts from DHS APFS and 20 more federal agencies — HHS, DOE, DOT, NASA, EPA, HUD, State, USACE — plus GSA eBuy RFQs, into one searchable, scored feed.

Filter by agency, set-aside, notice type, deadline, and place of performance.

topics.headline: Know who won — every night.
topics.body: Nightly USAspending sync of post-award contracts in your NAICS, scored across 7 relevance signals, with a Claude-drafted digest every Monday morning.
topics.hook_x: Who won in your NAICS last week? PursuitAI syncs USAspending nightly, scores every award across 7 relevance signals (your partners, your competitors, your recompetes), and emails a Monday-morning digest. Market awareness on autopilot.
topics.hook_ig:
Award announcements are competitive intelligence — if you actually see them.

The Contract Awards Tracker syncs USAspending every night and scores each award in your NAICS across 7 signals: tracked partners, predicted competitors, Recompete Radar matches, vehicle overlap, agency past performance, and more.

Every Monday, a Claude-drafted digest lands in your inbox.

topics.headline: Run every pursuit on one board.
topics.body: Move opportunities through Identified → Qualified → Bidding → Submitted with probability-weighted pipeline value, capture meeting logs, and win/loss debriefs that feed future bid decisions.
topics.hook_x: Your capture pipeline is not a spreadsheet relay. One board: Identified → Qualified → Bidding → Submitted, probability-weighted value, RFP deadlines, debrief capture — and your whole team sees it in real time.
topics.hook_ig:
Capture teams don't lose to competitors. They lose to spreadsheets.

PursuitAI runs every pursuit on one live board — Identified, Qualified, Bidding, Submitted — with probability-weighted pipeline value, capture meeting logs, RFP deadlines, and debrief outcomes that feed back into future bid/no-bid calls.

As a sub? Track your work-share % so the forecast reflects YOUR slice.

topics.headline: RFP packet in. Compliance matrix out.
topics.body: Upload the PDF cover + XLSX pricing template + DOCX amendments — get a structured compliance matrix, evaluation criteria, key personnel, contract terms, and Q&A pairs in one pass.
topics.hook_x: Reading a 200-page RFP packet by hand is how requirements get missed. Upload the whole packet — PDF, XLSX, DOCX — and PursuitAI returns the compliance matrix, eval criteria, key personnel, and Q&A pairs in one pass.
topics.hook_ig:
Every lost proposal has one missed requirement in it somewhere.

Upload an RFP, RFQ, or RFI packet — PDF cover, XLSX pricing template, DOCX amendments — and PursuitAI returns a structured compliance matrix, evaluation criteria, key personnel requirements, contract terms, and Q&A pairs. One pass.

Then draft against it, section by section.

topics.headline: A branded capability statement in 8 seconds.
topics.body: Company logo, technical capabilities by theme, representative engagements with outcomes — all grounded in your real past performance. Share via one tap on mobile.
topics.hook_x: Your capability statement should take 8 seconds, not 8 hours. PursuitAI generates a branded, multi-page cap statement grounded in your real past performance — and shares it from your phone's share sheet at industry days.
topics.hook_ig:
Industry day tomorrow and your capability statement is from 2023?

PursuitAI generates a branded multi-page capability statement in 8 seconds — logo, technical capabilities organized by theme, representative engagements with outcomes — all grounded in your actual contract history.

Share it with one tap from the mobile app.
topics.stat: 8 seconds, grounded in real past perf

topics.headline: Know which agencies you can actually win.
topics.body: A deterministic 0–100 score per agency built from your traction, in-NAICS demand, set-aside fit, and each agency's small-business goal gap — with the evidence behind every score.
topics.hook_x: Point your capture effort where the math favors you. Agency Affinity scores every agency 0–100 from your traction, in-NAICS demand, set-aside fit, and their SBA goal gap — with evidence, not vibes.
topics.hook_ig:
Some agencies are trailing their small-business goals right now — and that's your opening.

Agency Affinity scores every agency 0–100 for YOUR firm: your traction there, in-NAICS demand, set-aside fit, and how far the agency is behind its SBA goaling pace.

It tells you where to point capture effort — and shows the evidence behind every score.

topics.headline: A priced cost volume, not just a target.
topics.body: Upload a rate card, auto-match required LCATs from the RFQ, compute rate × hours × escalation × wrap × ODC — checked against GSA CALC ceilings. Export a stakeholder-safe BOE to Word.
topics.hook_x: Price-to-win gives you the number. The BOE builder gives you the defense: rate × hours × escalation × wrap × ODC, auto-matched to the RFQ's LCATs and checked against GSA CALC ceilings. Export to Word, done.
topics.hook_ig:
A winning price you can't defend is a losing price.

PursuitAI builds the full Basis of Estimate: define or upload your labor rate card, auto-match the LCATs extracted from the RFQ, then compute rate × hours × escalation × wrap × ODC — validated against GSA CALC ceilings and the solicitation's own ceiling.

Export a stakeholder-safe BOE straight to Word.

topics.headline: Résumé in. Proposal-ready write-up out.
topics.body: A tailored bio plus a requirement→evidence qualifications matrix — every solicitation requirement marked meets, partial, or gap, with the résumé line that proves it.
topics.hook_x: Key personnel volumes fail on unproven claims. PursuitAI maps every solicitation requirement to the exact résumé line that proves it — meets / partial / gap — and drafts the bio. Grounded strictly in the résumé, never invented.
topics.hook_ig:
Evaluators don't grade résumés. They grade evidence.

The Key-Personnel Deep-Dive turns a résumé into a tailored bio plus a requirement→evidence matrix: every solicitation requirement marked meets, partial, or gap — with the résumé line that proves it, and an honest list of gaps to shore up.

Save to a reusable library. Export a combined volume to Word.

topics.headline: Encrypted with YOUR key — not ours.
topics.body: NDAs, teaming agreements, proposal drafts — each file encrypted with your organization's own key before storage. Platform staff see metadata, never contents. Full access audit log.
topics.hook_x: Where do your teaming agreements and proposal drafts live right now? PursuitAI's vault encrypts every file with YOUR org's key — platform staff see metadata, never contents — with role-gated downloads and a full audit log.
topics.hook_ig:
Your NDAs and proposal drafts deserve better than a shared drive.

PursuitAI's Secure File Storage encrypts each document with your organization's own key before it's stored — platform staff can see metadata, never contents. In-app preview without download, role-gated access enforced at the storage layer, and a complete audit log.

Built for firms that get security-reviewed.

topics.headline: The CFO view of your book of business.
topics.body: Pipeline coverage against your annual goal, weighted forecast by quarter, at-risk pursuits with reasons, and win/loss rates by agency and set-aside. One click to a board-ready PDF.
topics.hook_x: Can you answer 'are we going to hit the number?' today? Executive Pipeline Analytics: coverage vs. annual goal, weighted forecast by quarter, at-risk pursuits with reasons, win rates by agency. One click → board-ready PDF.
topics.hook_ig:
Your pipeline review shouldn't be someone reading a spreadsheet aloud.

Executive Pipeline Analytics gives owners the real picture: pipeline coverage against your new-business goal, weighted forecast by quarter, top contributors, at-risk pursuits (each with the reason it's flagged), and win/loss rates by agency, set-aside, and value band.

One click exports a board-ready PDF.
topics.stat: Goal coverage · weighted forecast · board PDF

topics.headline: Winning is half the job. Manage the other half.
topics.body: Modifications, CDRL deliverables, CPARS ratings with an AI narrative drafter — then promote the finished contract into your Past Performance library for the next bid.
topics.hook_x: The contract you just delivered is your best sales asset — if it's documented. PursuitAI tracks mods, CDRLs, and CPARS, drafts the performance narrative, and promotes the win into your past-perf library for the next proposal.
topics.hook_ig:
Every completed contract should make your next proposal stronger.

My Contracts manages the post-award lifecycle: modifications, CDRL deliverables with status tracking, CPARS ratings with an AI drafter that turns your six factor ratings into a grounded narrative — no invented metrics.

Then promote the finished contract straight into your Past Performance library.

topics.headline: The $30K capture stack, from $249/mo.
topics.body: AI fit scoring, recompete radar, sub-award intel, price-to-win, proposal drafting, and the 50% rule check — one platform, a fraction of the incumbents' price. Free 14-day trial.
topics.hook_x: GovWin-class intelligence: ~$30K/yr. PursuitAI: from $249/mo — fit scoring, recompete radar, sub-award intel, price-to-win, proposal drafting, and the only built-in 50% rule check. Free 14-day trial, no credit card.
topics.hook_ig:
The incumbent capture platforms price small businesses out at ~$30K/year.

PursuitAI is the whole capture pipeline — AI fit scoring across SAM.gov + 21 agency forecasts, recompete radar, sub-award intelligence, teaming match, price-to-win, proposal drafting, and set-aside compliance — from $249/mo.

Start with a free 14-day trial. No credit card. Set up in under 2 minutes.

topics.headline: Capture doesn't stop at your desk.
topics.body: Get an RFP in Mail or Slack? Share → PursuitAI and the right Claude analyzer fires automatically. Generate outlines, share past performance, biometric unlock.
topics.hook_x: An RFP lands in your inbox at the airport. Tap Share → PursuitAI — the compliance matrix is waiting when you land. Native iOS, iPad & Android apps with biometric unlock. GovCon capture, pocket-sized.
topics.hook_ig:
The RFP doesn't wait for you to get back to your desk.

With PursuitAI's native iOS, iPad & Android apps, you tap Share on any document in Mail, Slack, or Files — and the right analyzer fires automatically: compliance matrix for RFPs, Q&A extractor for Q&A packets.

Generate outlines, share your capability statement from the share sheet, unlock with Face ID.
